title: DSPT AI on Tap #5 @ Cerveja Canil
description:
**🍻 Data Science Portugal presents: DSPT AI on Tap back in Lisbon**

We’re bringing AI on Tap back to Lisbon. No slides. No talks. Just great people, casual conversation, and craft beer. If you work with AI, study it, build products, do research, or you’re simply curious, you’re welcome. Digital nomads, students, corporate AI folks, founders, and newcomers all fit right in.

**Conversation starter: bring 1 thing to share**

To make it easy to meet people, we invite everyone to bring one small “conversation seed”. Any of these works:

* 📌 A question you’re currently stuck on
* 🧠 A concept you finally understood
* 🧪 A mini experiment you tried
* 🛠️ A tool, workflow, or prompt pattern you’re using
* 📰 A recent paper, blog post, or demo you found interesting
* 💼 A real-world use case you’re exploring at work or school

You can keep it short, 30 to 60 seconds is perfect.

**What to expect**

* 🍺 Great craft beer and relaxed community vibes
* 🤝 Easy networking, no awkward forced intros
* 💬 Small groups, practical chats, and lots of shared learning
* 🌍 A diverse crowd: newcomers and experienced folks

📅 **When:** June 24
🕓 **Time:** 5:45 PM
📌 **Location:** Cerveja Canil

Bring your curiosity, grab a drink, and come share your top pick of the year. 🍻

**RSVP now!**

title: DSPT x TensorOps: Programmatic Advertising in the Age of AI
description:
**Lisbon, let’s talk about ads 🤑🤖✨**​Ever wonder how the digital ads you see are selected, priced, and delivered in just a few milliseconds? Behind every impression is a high-speed technical ecosystem of real-time bidding, prediction models, identity signals, ranking systems, optimization loops, and increasingly, AI agents.

**[Data Science Portugal](https://www.linkedin.com/company/11336688/admin/page-posts/published/?share=true#) × [TensorOps](tensorops.ai)** are teaming up for **“Beyond the Click: Programmatic Advertising in the Age of AI.”**

The era of basic bidding is behind us. Machine learning, generative models, and predictive analytics are completely rewriting the rules of audience targeting, yield optimization, and campaign generation. Whether you're building the algorithms yourself or just curious about the tech shaping digital advertising on the web, this is where you need to be.

Join us for an exclusive, unfiltered **roundtable including top leaders from the advertising and publishing industry**. We’ll be decoding the algorithms driving the next generation of ads, followed by high-level **networking 🧠🤝** with Lisbon's top data scientists, ML engineers, and AdTech innovators.

📍 **In-person:** Cloudflare Lisbon
​**🗣️ Speakers**
​**Pedro Sousa** – Country Manager Portugal, Adsmovil
**Sérgio Oliveira** – Head of Business Transformation & Board Member, Publicis Group
**Gad Benram** – CTO, TensorOps

​**🗓️ Agenda**
​**17:30** – Reception
**18:00** – DSPT Kickoff
**18:05** – Agentic AI in AdTech - Gad Benram & Tiago Barbosa (TensorOps)
**18:35** – Roundtable: What’s Real, What’s Hype, and What Comes Next (Gad Benram, Pedro Sousa, Sérgio Oliveira, moderated by André Fragoso)
**19:30** – Networking and Cloudflare Office Tour

**See you soon 👋**

title: AI on Tap #4: Porto
description:
Porto, we’re back for another **AI on Tap** 🍻

This is our casual get-together for the AI and data community. We pick a place, grab a drink, and let the conversations happen.

Whether you’re working with GenAI, machine learning, data science, product, research, or you’re just curious about what people are building and thinking about lately, come by and join us.

This time we’ll meet at **Restaurante Sidraria Celta Endovélico**, a cozy spot in Porto where everyone can order whatever they feel like.

**What to expect**

* Drinks after work
* Conversations about AI, data, tech, projects, jobs, ideas, or whatever comes up
* A chance to meet people from the community
* A relaxed evening with good people

**When**
📅 **Tuesday, June 2**
🕕 **18:00 to 20:00**

**Where**
📍 **Restaurante Sidraria Celta Endovélico**
Rua dos Mártires da Liberdade 29, 4050-360 Porto

Spots are limited, so RSVP if you’re joining.
See you there! 👋

title: DSPT x DareData: The hard part of building AI
description:
Lisbon, it’s time to move out of localhost! 🤖✨ DSPT is back with the third event of our **Primavera AI Fest** series.

​We are teaming up with **DareData**, who will be hosting us for an afternoon dedicated to the gritty reality of putting AI into production. Expect unfiltered, real-world lessons from AI leaders and experts at **DareData** and **QuintoAndar** on what it actually takes to scale AI beyond the demo stage.

​If you are tired of theoretical use cases and want to hear the hard truths about evals, RAG breakdowns, and scaling agentic chatbots, this is exactly where you need to be.

​🎙️ The Sessions

​**Talk 1: Unlocalhost me: The hard part of building AI products** *By Luís Alves (AI Engineer, DareData) & Artur Simões (Data Engineer, DareData)* Building an AI demo is easy. Shipping a real product is where it gets messy. Artur and Luís will share the hard problems they faced taking GenOS to production: why RAG breaks down when documents look nearly identical, how to evaluate a model when "good" is a moving target, and the challenges of pioneering an FDE setup at product scale. Expect honest lessons from productionizing AI, and what they wish they'd known before leaving localhost.

​**Talk 2: Shipping AI at Scale Without Losing Your Mind** *By Tania Torovets (Senior Head of AI, QuintoAndar)* Real lessons from building production AI systems at scale in 2024–2026. From the first copilot to eight agentic chatbots in production. Tania covers what worked, what didn’t, and what her team had to unlearn. Discover why the bottleneck is rarely the model itself, but rather evals, observability, and how your organisation thinks about probabilistic systems. Learn four core beliefs about what it actually takes to ship AI beyond the demo stage.

​🗓️ The Agenda

* ​**17:30** — 🚪 Reception & Check-in
* ​**18:00** — 👋 Welcoming by DSPT
* ​**18:10** — 🛠️ *Session 1:* Unlocalhost me: The hard part of building AI products (Luís Alves & Artur Simões, DareData)
* ​**18:30** — 🚀 *Session 2:* Shipping AI at Scale — Without Losing Your Mind (Tania Torovets, QuintoAndar)
* ​**18:50** — 🎤 Roundtable
* ​**19:15** — 🍻 Networking, Drinks & Bites

​📍 The Details

* ​**When:** June 2nd at 5:30 PM
* ​**Where:** DareData Office

​Space is limited! Secure your spot, and let’s talk production AI. See you there! 👋

title: DSPT x ISS Tech Portugal x Critical TechWorks: Bias and Fairness in AI
description:
Porto, we are back! 🤖✨ DSPT - Data Science Portugal is excited to bring the community together for another evening of great discussions, learning, and networking.

For this event, we are teaming up with **ISS Tech Portugal**, who will be hosting us at their offices in the heart of Porto.

As AI models become more deeply integrated into our daily lives and decision-making processes, a critical question arises: *Are our algorithms playing fair?* Join us for a deep dive into how we can identify, understand, and mitigate bias in machine learning models to build more equitable AI systems.

Whether you're building GenAI products, working with predictive models, or simply curious about AI ethics, this meetup is for you.

**🎙️ Speakers**
**Lia Meireles**, **Marta Monteiro** & **Susana Neves** from **Critical TechWorks** present us "*Fairness in AI: Are we responsible?*" — exploring real-world AI failures, how bias creeps into models at scale, what the EU AI Act means for people building this stuff, and what we can all do to build systems we can actually trust.

**🗓️ The Agenda**
18:00 — 🚪 Get together & Check-in
18:10 — 👋 Welcome by DSPT
18:20 — 🧠 Talk: Fairness in AI: Are we responsible?
18:40 — 🎤 Q&A
19:00 — 🍻 Networking, Drinks & Bites

**When**: Thursday, May 28 at 6:00 PM
**Where**: ISS Tech Portugal - R. Santa Catarina 1232, Porto

Space is limited, so grab your spot, bring your curiosity, and let’s talk about the future of responsible AI. See you there! 👋
